title: Disticholiparis trullifera
taxonomy: Disticholiparis trullifera is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is a member of the Asparagales order and the Orchidaceae family. It is an epiphytic orchid native to New Caledonia. Further classification of Disticholiparis trullifera includes its placement in the subfamily Malpighioidae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Disticholiparis.
